description: Personal health data from the Oura Ring - sleep, readiness, daily activity, heart rate, workouts, SpO2, stress, and resilience.

novel_features.name: Local SQLite Sync
novel_features.description: Mirror Oura usercollection data into a local SQLite store for offline search and analysis

novel_features.name: Full-Text Search
novel_features.description: FTS5 full-text search across locally synced Oura records

novel_features.name: Local Analytics
novel_features.description: Aggregate group-by and count queries over locally synced health data

novel_features.name: Compound Workflows
novel_features.description: Chain multiple Oura API operations into one agent-friendly command
